verificationNotes: MIT Teaching and Learning Lab (TLL) official resource page for faculty on incorporating or mitigating generative AI in courses. Covers assignment redesign, process-focused assessment, in-class quizzes, leveraging GenAI for higher-order thinking. Recommended by MIT Chair of the Faculty for spring 2024 semester. Updated April 2025. Teaching-level guidance rather than formal institutional policy, but represents official institutional teaching recommendations.
